processors.dqlScript:
parse source_pipeline, "JSON:source_pipeline" 
| fieldsAdd cicd.upstream_pipeline.id = source_pipeline[project][id]
| fieldsAdd cicd.upstream_pipeline.run.id = source_pipeline[pipeline_id]

parse object_attributes, "JSON:object_attributes" 
| fieldsAdd cicd.pipeline.run.id = object_attributes[id]
| fieldsAdd cicd.pipeline.run.url.full = object_attributes[url]
| fieldsAdd cicd.pipeline.run.trigger = object_attributes[source]
| fieldsAdd cicd.pipeline.run.variable = object_attributes[variables]
| fieldsAdd outcome = if (isNotNull(object_attributes[finished_at]) and object_attributes[status] != "running", object_attributes[status] )
| fieldsAdd cicd.pipeline.run.outcome = if(outcome == "failed","failure", else:outcome)
| fieldsRemove outcome

| fieldsRemove outcome
